highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.118.0 previews Skia milestones m117 and m118 with security and platform updates.
highlights_body: Includes a new Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget, .NET 9 Blazor fixes, updated freetype2, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz 8.3.1, plus Android NDK r27c and WASM improvements.

bullets.lead: Skia updated to milestones m117 and m118
bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances through two milestones, bringing upstream rendering improvements and bug fixes.
New Metal-specific constructors and accessors on GRBackendRenderTarget are now available across all supported Apple platforms.
.NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor rendering issues are fixed, and Blazor workarounds have been moved into the WASM layer for cleaner behaviour.
An incorrect PackagePath attribute in the NuGet packages has been fixed.

bullets.lead: Windows SDK version pinned via project property
bullets.detail: The Windows SDK version is now set via the WindowsSdkPackageVersion project property, avoiding version conflicts.

bullets.lead: Base-path import fixed for Blazor apps
bullets.detail: Blazor applications that configure a base path now correctly import SkiaSharp assets.

bullets.lead: Android NDK updated to r27c with 16 KB page alignment
bullets.detail: The Android NDK is updated to r27c, supporting the 16 KB memory page size required by newer Android devices.
freetype2, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo, and HarfBuzz have all been updated to their latest versions.

contributor_summaries.spouliot: Added Metal API support for GRBackendRenderTarget across Apple platforms

preview_summaries.3.118.0-p2: Preview 2 added the Metal GRBackendRenderTarget API, fixed .NET 9 Blazor rendering, updated the Android NDK to r27c, and resolved the NuGet PackagePath issue.
preview_summaries.3.118.0-p1: Preview 1 advanced the bundled Skia engine through milestones m117 and m118 and updated HarfBuzz to 8.3.1.

harfbuzz_summary: Updates HarfBuzzSharp to 8.3.1 alongside the NDK and platform packaging fixes from this release.
